summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Adrena Trading Competition Platform. All 13 backend API tests passed. All frontend pages load correctly with correct data and UI elements.

issues: Arena page shows 'LOADING ARENA...' spinner while fetching Adrena live protocol data from external API - this is expected but may be slow on network issues

critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~692 lines - approaching the 700-line limit, consider splitting into routers
Live leaderboard (/api/leaderboard/live) fetches Adrena positions for all registered wallets sequentially - no async parallelism, could be slow with many users
Sidebar shows 'BRACKET' label but route is /tournament - these are consistent (sidebar links to /tournament correctly), minor label mismatch in test expectations only
seed_data_creation: Two test wallet players registered via /api/players/register-wallet during testing: TEST_WalletAddr1234567890abcdef (TEST_WalletUser) and TEST_WalletAddrIdempotent12345
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. Backend has 13 passing tests. Pages: Arena (hero, protocol data, top traders), Leaderboard (Competition + Live tabs, empty live state graceful), Tournament (/tournament route not /bracket - sidebar label says BRACKET but links to /tournament correctly), Profile (connect wallet banner, mock player fallback, XP bar, badges, AI insights button), Teams (4 teams with member counts), Quests (quest list with progress bars), Social (social feed with posts). Wallet connect button present but cannot test actual wallet connection.
